description: You are a mechanical engineer preparing HVAC documentation for a residential building permit. Open the garage floor plan at '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/floorplan.dxf' in LibreCAD to design a conditioning system for a 2-car garage workshop. Overlay a complete HVAC ductwork system following standard mechanical engineering drawing conventions. The drawing must include supply air duct routing from an air handler unit to each zone (drawn as centerlines on dedicated supply layers), return air duct routing, at least three supply diffuser or register locations marked with appropriate symbols, duct sizing callouts for each major segment, a labeled air handler unit location, and a separate notes layer with a system summary. Use standard mechanical/HVAC layer naming conventions and save the result to '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/floorplan_hvac.dxf'.
